description: Official LaTeX template for the International Symposium on Energy: Energy Transition, Green Hydrogen and Sustainable Industry (ISE). Provides bilingual (Portuguese/English) title and language switching, custom abstract environment, author/affiliation blocks, formatted section/subsection headings with lettered subsection numbering, figure/table formatting, IEEE-style biblatex citations, and a branded fancy header with logo, based on a custom ISESettings style include.
